tech_news.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

tech_news.title: Sony to end physical PlayStation game discs for new releases starting in 2028 - Fox Business
tech_news.description: Sony says all new PlayStation games released after January 2028 will be sold digitally, reflecting changing consumer demand and the gaming industry's broader move away from physical media.

tech_news.title: Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft’s disc-to-digital feature could be essential for next-gen Xbox consoles.

Oregon store suspends Yu-Gi-Oh tournaments due to hygiene concerns - upi.com
tech_news.description: An Oregon game store announced it is suspending Yu-Gi-Oh card game tournaments for one week due to complaints about the hygiene of attendees.

tech_news.title: The PlayStation Stores On PlayStation 3 And Vita Are Shutting Down - Game Informer
tech_news.description: Starting this year and into 2027, Sony is sunsetting the digital storefront for two of its oldest online store platforms.

tech_news.title: Gemini Spark, Google’s agentic assistant, is now available on Mac - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.
